_comment: Optional extra public-domain trail route sources for fetch-trails.py. Copy this file to trail-sources.json and add ArcGIS REST query endpoints (e.g. a state-park or county GIS portal). Each is tried after the built-in USFS/NPS/USGS sources. Find a layer's query URL in its ArcGIS REST page (…/MapServer/<id>/query) and the polyline trail-name field. order_field is optional (a milepost/sequence field for ordering segments).
label: EXAMPLE-State-Parks
